content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Tree Matching". Refer to LeetCode description: https://cses.fi/problemset/task/1130
constraints: The given trees are guaranteed to be trees (connected and acyclic)
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of nodes in the tree. Then, a tree is given as n-1 lines, each containing two integers a and b, denoting an edge between nodes a and b. After that, a pattern tree is given in the same format.
content.outputFormat: The program should output the number of occurrences of the pattern tree in the main tree.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a tree traversal algorithm (e.g., DFS) to traverse both trees and compare their structures.

code.Python3:
import sys
MAXN = 100005
# Define tree structure and functions to traverse and compare trees
def main():
    n = int(sys.stdin.readline())
    # Read tree structure and pattern tree
    # Traverse and compare trees
if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
